title: Ubiquiti PowerBeam5 AC ISO 400, PBE-5AC-400-ISO
description: The PBE-5AC-400-ISO is a suitable device for PtP connections with a 25dBi antenna gain from the airMAX AC series, which achieves very high transmission speeds and a stable connection even in a noisy environment. The unit is compatible only with other airMAX AC products and is designed for outdoor use. In the unit is possible to set very wild channel width 10/20/30/40/50/60 and 80MHz , real throughput in good condition may by up to 450Mbps+ can be achieved using 256QAM airMAX® ac products offer improved latency, noise immunity , scalability and significantly increased throughput performance The integrated isolator design improves RF isolation to spatially filter out interference, and the metal-plated interior of the rear housing enhances RF shielding Compare the two near-field plots, and note the superior performance of the integrated RF isolator. Both near-field plots are displayed in watts and use a linear scale Device (feed) Parabolic antenna Gigabit PoE injector Power cord Plastic feed house Holder Radom cover
